name: Liver Dumplings (Majgomboc)
recipeIngredient: A pinch each of salt, pepper, and finely chopped parsley
recipeInstructions:
1. Scrape the liver with the blunt side of a knife.
2. Mix well with the fat and other ingredients.
3. Drop teaspoonfuls at a time into boiling soup.
4. Continue boiling for three to seven minutes, or until they rise to the surface of the soup.
